title: erigeron piperianus
intro: Erigeron piperianus, also known as Peruvian fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family that grows in the high-altitude regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erigeron piperianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Erigeron piperianus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
